caption: A video presentation features a white slide background with a blue header bar. In the top right corner, a small inset video shows a woman with long brown hair wearing a light-colored top. The initial slides display the text "Fluent Bit v1.6" followed by "New Enterprise Connectors". Below this text are three logos: the Azure logo with the word "Azure", a stylized orange and yellow L-shaped logo, and the AWS logo with the text "S3 and Firehose". As the video progresses, the slide content changes to "Fluent Bit v1.6" followed by "New Filters". This updated slide features a large orange arrow logo pointing upwards with a gear icon at its base, placed above the text "TensorFlow Lite". The transition between the scenes is a direct jump from the enterprise connectors slide to the new filters slide, while the speaker in the inset video remains visible throughout.
